tasting_rooms.name: Mosel-Vinothek
tasting_rooms.pricing: Walk-in tasting flights from the bottle list; over 100 Mosel Rieslings available by the glass
tasting_rooms.description: The world's largest vinotheque for Mosel Riesling, set in the vaulted cellars of the St. Nikolaus-Hospital in Kues. Over 100 wines from the whole Mosel region can be tasted under one roof.

tasting_rooms.name: Stiftungsweingut Vereinigte Hospitien
tasting_rooms.pricing: Cellar tours Wednesdays and Fridays 11:00 or by arrangement; group tastings by appointment
tasting_rooms.description: Tasting and tour venue at the charitable foundation estate whose cellar, built around 330 AD, is reckoned the oldest wine cellar in Germany. Riesling and Pinot wines from Scharzhofberg and the Saar.

tasting_rooms.name: Bischoefliche Weingueter Trier Vinothek
tasting_rooms.pricing: Moderated tasting 25 EUR per person; wine-walk tasting 32 EUR per person; Vinothek open for sampling Monday to Saturday
tasting_rooms.description: Vinothek of the church-owned estate above a 30,000 square metre Late Antique cellar. Sample across the full Mosel, Saar and Ruwer range, then buy on the spot with a same-day purchase discount.

tasting_rooms.name: Weingut Dr. Loosen Tasting Room
tasting_rooms.pricing: Regular tasting 20 EUR per person (5 wines); individual tasting 30 EUR per person (7 wines)
tasting_rooms.description: Tasting bar of Ernst Loosen's celebrated VDP estate on the Mosel bank just outside Bernkastel. Riesling-only flights drawn from grand-cru parcels including Wehlener Sonnenuhr and Erdener Treppchen.

tasting_rooms.name: Weingut Markus Molitor Vinothek
tasting_rooms.pricing: Tastings at Klosterberg House by selection from more than 40 wines; by arrangement
tasting_rooms.description: Tasting room in the ancestral Klosterberg house of Markus Molitor, one of the Mosel's most decorated estates. Choose your own flight from over 40 Rieslings and Pinots across the dry-to-noble-sweet spectrum.

tasting_rooms.name: dieMOSEL Vinothek and Winebar
tasting_rooms.pricing: Vinothek tasting flights and by-the-glass pours in the historic cellar
tasting_rooms.description: Vinothek and wine bar behind thick slate walls in the former cellar of an 1890 wine-trade villa in art-nouveau Traben-Trarbach. Curated Mosel selection with a small soulfood kitchen alongside.

tasting_rooms.name: Vinothek Zum Landsknecht
tasting_rooms.pricing: Walk-in tasting flights and by-the-glass pours on the Mosel promenade
tasting_rooms.description: Riverside vinothek on the Gestade promenade in Bernkastel, pairing a rotating Mosel by-the-glass list with light plates. A relaxed walk-in counter steps from the medieval Marktplatz.

tasting_rooms.name: Weingut und Weinstube Schleimer
tasting_rooms.pricing: Estate tastings and Weinstube by-the-glass pours, ten minutes from Trier centre
tasting_rooms.description: Third-generation family estate and wine tavern in the Olewig valley at the foot of Trier's vineyards. Tastings of the house Rieslings and Pinots in a relaxed Weinstube setting.

tasting_rooms.name: Weingut Georg Fritz von Nell
tasting_rooms.pricing: Estate tastings and wine sales on site; sparkling Sekt and Mosel Rieslings
tasting_rooms.description: Long-established Trier-Olewig estate where visitors can taste and buy the house Mosel wines, including traditional-method Sekt, in the family Weinstube and cellar.
